nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rennell gerygone
nodes.summary: Rennell gerygone（Gerygone citrina）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Rennell gerygone。

nodes.name: Gerygone
nodes.summary: Gerygone（Gerygone）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联19种鸟类，如Yellow-bellied gerygone、Brown gerygone、Green-backed gerygone等19种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rennell gerygone
nodes.summary: The Rennell gerygone (Gerygone citrina) is a species of bird in the family Acanthizidae. It lives on Rennell Island. It was formerly considered a subspecies of the fan-tailed gerygone (Gerygone flavolateralis), but was split as a distinct species by the International Ornithologists' Union in 2021. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Rennell gerygone (Gerygone citrina) is a species of bird in the family Acanthizidae. It lives on Rennell Island.
